extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL Warren attacked from the GC group on the final climb Izoard, hunted down 7-minute breakaway leader Atapuma inside final kilometer.
tactical_patterns: AG2R placed two riders in breakaway while holding four back for Bardet, demonstrating dual-stage racing approach.
Barguil left GC contenders group on final climb despite 7-minute deficit, calculated he had superior climbing legs.
Melanda attacked to draw out Froome's competitors late on Izoard; when they refused bait, Froome bridged himself.
Bardet sprinted for third-place time bonus in final kilometer, prioritizing 4 seconds over energy conservation for TT.

rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: won from GC group after 7-minute chase, commentary confirms best pure climber in race not just consistent breakaway rider
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: aggressive sprint for third-place bonus shows desperation for podium time gaps before Marseille TT
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: lost 6 seconds to Bardet in stage finish, commentary expects him to gain time in final TT suggesting climbing weakness
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: attacked for Froome but dropped in finale, reduced to domestique role despite earlier stage-winning form
rider_signals.ATAPUMA Darwin: negative: held 7-minute advantage entering final climb but caught with 1km remaining, Colombian Independence Day opportunity wasted
